pr.title: Record: SP4096 + Depth Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + MuonEq-R + Full GPTQ — val_bpb 1.0904 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Uses SP4096 tokenization, widened MLP, depth recurrence, parallel residual lanes, MuonEq-R, and int6 GPTQ compression for the 10min/16MB track.
techniques: SP4096 vocab with 4× MLP and higher weight decay
Depth recurrence plus parallel residual lane merging
MuonEq-R training with full int6 GPTQ + Brotli wrapper
